message:
refactor(models): consolidate reasoning detection into model_is_reasoning

Remove the duplicate is_model_reasoning_capable function which maintained
a parallel set of hardcoded prefix lists. Move the two model families
(DeepSeek R1, Qwen QWQ) that were only covered there into the canonical
model_is_reasoning match chain. All other prefixes from the deleted
function are already handled by existing match arms in model_is_reasoning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
